title: Objectives
description: A simple quest-like plugin that offers challenges to your players
body:
# Objectives

Objectives is a simple quest-like plugin that offers challenges for your players to complete. Objectives currently come in two flavors: daily and weekly. As the name suggests, daily Objectives refresh every day, while weekly ones refresh every 7 days.

## Types
Types and their descriptions are viewable in-game through `/o types`
* Collect - Pick up items from killed entities
* Daily - Complete a daily Objective
* Farm - Break fully grown crops
* Fish - Catch fish/items with a fishing rod
* Kill - Kill entities
* Mine - Mine blocks
* Tame - Tame animals
* Trade - Trade with merchants/villagers
* Place - Place blocks

## Commands

* `/o` - Display the currently active challenges
* `/o help` - Display a list of the plugin's commands
* `/o types` - Display a list of Objective types
* `/o reload` - Reload the config and objectives YML files
* `/o refresh <daily|weekly>` - Refresh the currently active objectives of the specified time, replacing the old ones with new ones

## Permissions

* `objectives.admin` - Allows access to both `/o reload` and `/o refresh`
